title: Goz Beida Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Goz Beida with a Z-Score of +3.66. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Goz Beida has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 53% and the wind speed is at 15.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
